🇰🇷 Seoulful Food × Seoulful Mood

Warmth of Seoul,
baked with love.

Be Yourself. That is most universal. Welcome to Richmond's cozy corner for artisanal Salted Butter Bread, authentic Korean bunsik, and handcrafted pastel lattes.

Explore The Lineup
🥐

Freshly Baked

Multiple times daily

Our Philosophy

A cozy Seoulful mood, wherever you are.

The Seoulful is inspired by the warmth, cozy design, and sweet aromas of neighborhood bakeries in Seoul. We fuse traditional Korean bakery items with contemporary aesthetics, creating products that speak to your soul.

Every bun, drink, and sandwich is curated with care. From our signature crispy Salted Butter Bread to savory egg-wrapped Kimbap and pastel-shaded farm lattes, we aim to make comfort food beautiful.

🧈

Premium Butter

We use high-grade cultured butter for our signature golden crusts.

🍵

Real Ingredients

Matcha sourced from Uji, purple yams for ube, and farm-fresh cream.

Fresh Daily Menu

Explore Our Lineups

Take a look at our daily offerings, curated with the finest ingredients. Select a category below to filter our specialties.

🥐 Salted Butter Bread & Buns Signature Lineup

Best Seller

Classic Salted Butter Bread

100% (26)

Crispy on the outside, soft and buttery inside. A perfect balance of salty and savory.

80 g • Classic Details
Fresh Cream

Fresh Milk Cream Salt Bread

92% (28)

Soft milk cream fills the center for a smooth, delicate sweetness that melts in your mouth.

90 g • Sweet Cream Details
Premium

Dubai Chocolate Salt Bread

95% (22)

Buttery salt bread filled with rich chocolate, pistachio cream, and crispy crunch elements.

90 g • Sweet & Crunchy Details
Savory

Garlic Cream Cheese Bun

100% (9)

Garlic butter cream glaze on the outside, filled with luscious creamy cream cheese inside.

Creamy & Rich Details

Everything Salt Butter Bread

100% (11)

Loaded with sesame, garlic, and onion for that perfect satisfying crunch and complex herb flavor.

80 g • Savory Details
Chef Recommended

Creme Brulee Bun

100% (4)

Caramelized sugar coating on the outside, filled with real, aromatic vanilla bean custard inside.

Sweet Custard Details

Red Bean Butter Salt Bread

100% (4)

Chewy mochi and sweet red bean wrapped in buttery salted bread for a cozy classic Korean treat.

90 g • Sweet & Chewy Details

Black Sesame Cream Bun

100%

Soft bun filled with nutty black sesame cream, lightly dusted with fine black sesame powder.

Roast Vibe Details

Earl Grey Salt Bread

95% (22)

Earl Grey infused cream with creamy farm milk - elegant, fragrant, and mellow.

90 g • Tea Cream Details

Seoulful Chili's Mozza

New Item

Mozzarella meets Seoulful house chili — melty, savory, warm, and extra cheesy.

Savory & Warm Details

🥢 Seoul-Full Bunsik Kimbap, Sandwiches & Tteokbokki

Hot & Spicy

Classic Seoul Tteokbokki

66% (3)

Authentic Korean style - chewy, flavorful, and simmered in our secret spicy broth.

250 g • Bunshik Details
Popular

Creamy Rose Tteokbokki

96% (27)

Rich, cheesy, and perfectly creamy — not too spicy, with an incredibly smooth flavor.

280 g • Creamy Rose Details
Hearty

Bulgogi Kimbap

89% (19)

Korean-style marinated sweet beef meets hand-cut pickled and fresh garden veggies.

Classic Roll Details
Light Bite

Egg Rollie Kimbap

100% (5)

Soft layers of seasoned egg wrapped gently around seasoned rice and savory veggies.

Savory & Light Details

Seoul BBQ Kimbap

85% (7)

Grilled Korean BBQ pork, fresh crisp lettuce, and crunchy cucumbers rolled beautifully.

250 g • Pork Roll Details
Chef Special

LE SEOUL Sandwich

100% (6)

A Seoul-meets-Paris bite — sweet pistachio paste, quality ham, and cold premium butter slabs.

180 g • Baguette Details

🍹 Specialty Drinks Farm Lattes & Sparkling Ades

Highly Addictive

Strawberry Matcha Latte

60% (5)

Vibrant green matcha poured over sweet, real crushed farm strawberry compote and cold milk.

Cold • Signature Details
Floral Vibe

Lavender Cream Matcha

66% (3)

Premium grade matcha layered with house floral lavender sweet cream foam for a soothing finish.

Cold • Craft Details
Ube Favorite

Tropical Ube Coconut

Best Seller

Vibrant purple ube yam paired with smooth tropical coconut milk - ultra creamy and rich.

Cold • Earthy Details

Strawberry Farm Latte

100% (5)

Sweet, local farm strawberries blended with fresh milk. No caffeine, pure happiness.

Cold • Farm Vibe Details
Healthy Choice

Seoulful Cereal Latte

100% (8)

Made with premium 5-Grain Superfood roasted grain powder. Incredibly toasty, nutty, and creamy.

Hot/Cold • Nutty Details

Shine Muscat Ade

Fizzy

Light, sweet, and incredibly crisp carbonated ade with premium green Shine Muscat pieces.

Cold • Sparkling Details
